ddls:
CREATE TABLE "traffic_accidents" (
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident record */,
  "geoid" REAL /* Geographic identifier for the location of the accident */,
  "town" TEXT /* Name of the town or area where the accident occurred */,
  "total_crashes" INTEGER /* Total number of crashes recorded in the area */,
  "total_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries resulting from accidents */,
  "total_fatalities" INTEGER /* Total number of fatalities from accidents */,
  "color_code" TEXT /* Color code representing the severity level of accidents */,
  "accident_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the accident */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the accident location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the accident location */,
  "police_report_number" TEXT /* Unique number assigned by the police */,
  "vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "pedestrian_count" INTEGER /* Number of pedestrians involved in the accident */,
  "bicycle_count" INTEGER /* Number of bicycles involved in the accident */,
  "commercial_vehicle_count" INTEGER /* Number of commercial vehicles involved in the accident */,
  "road_type" TEXT /* Type of road (e.g., highway, city street) */,
  "road_lighting" TEXT /* Lighting conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "intersection" INTEGER /* Whether the accident occurred at an intersection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("accident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_traffic_accidents_color_code FOREIGN KEY ("color_code") REFERENCES accident_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "geoid" REAL /* Geographic identifier for the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the county is located */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the area */,
  "main_roads" TEXT /* List of main roads in the area */,
  "traffic_signals" INTEGER /* Number of traffic signals in the area */,
  "speed_limits" TEXT /* Speed limits in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geoid")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each accident report */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated accident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "road_conditions" TEXT /* Road conditions at the time of the accident */,
  "contributing_factors" TEXT /* Factors contributing to the accident (e.g., speeding, DUI) */,
  "police_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the police officer who filed the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., open, closed, under review) */,
  "additional_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the accident */,
  "estimated_damage" REAL /* Estimated damage in monetary terms */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accident_reports_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injury_statistics" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated accident */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of injuries (e.g., minor, serious, critical) */,
  "number_of_injuries" INTEGER /* Total number of injuries reported */,
  "hospitalization_needed" INTEGER /* Indicates if hospitalization is needed (true/false) */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., broken bone, concussion) */,
  "injury_location" TEXT /* Part of the body injured */,
  "recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated recovery time for the injuries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injury_statistics_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fatality_statistics" (
  "fatality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fatality record */,
  "accident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated accident */,
  "victim_age" INTEGER /* Age of the victim involved in the accident */,
  "victim_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the victim */,
  "circumstances" TEXT /* Circumstances surrounding the fatality */,
  "victim_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the victim */,
  "victim_residence" TEXT /* Residence of the victim */,
  "victim_relationship" TEXT /* Relationship of the victim to the driver (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fatality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fatality_statistics_accident_id FOREIGN KEY ("accident_id") REFERENCES traffic_accidents ("accident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_conditions" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather condition (e.g., Clear, Rainy, Snowy) */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of the accident */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the time of the accident */,
  "visibility" TEXT /* Visibility at the time of the accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "road_conditions" (
  "road_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each road condition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the road condition (e.g., Dry, Wet, Icy) */,
  "road_surface" TEXT /* Type of road surface (e.g., asphalt, concrete) */,
  "road_width" REAL /* Width of the road */,
  "road_signs" TEXT /* Presence and type of road signs in the area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("road_condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contributing_factors" (
  "factor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contributing factor */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the contributing factor (e.g., Speeding, DUI, Distracted Driving) */,
  "alcohol_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether alcohol was involved */,
  "drug_involvement" INTEGER /* Whether drugs were involved */,
  "fatigue" INTEGER /* Whether fatigue was a factor */,
  "distraction_source" TEXT /* Source of distraction (e.g., mobile phone, GPS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("factor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accident_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of accident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the accident type (e.g., Rear-end, T-bone, Head-on) */,
  "severity_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the severity of the accident */,
  "common_causes" TEXT /* Common causes of this type of accident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "towns" (
  "town_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each town */,
  "town_name" TEXT /* Name of the town */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county where the town is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the town */,
  "emergency_services" TEXT /* Availability of emergency services in the town */,
  "public_transportation" TEXT /* Availability of public transportation */,
  "safety_initiatives" TEXT /* Current safety initiatives in the town */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("town_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, administrator) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the notification was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the recipient of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the notification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)
